currencies.vatLabel: EU VAT (typically 19–27% depending on your country)

providers.name: Anthropic — Claude
providers.tagline: The best AI for creative writing
providers.description: Claude models are trained with a strong focus on nuanced writing, instruction-following, and long-form coherence. The best choice for StoryLock.
providers.apiKeyInstructions: Sign in → API Keys → Create Key

models.name: Claude Sonnet 4.6
models.notes: Best balance of speed and quality. Ideal for checking, revising, and brainstorming.

models.name: Claude Opus 4.8
models.notes: Maximum capability for complex structural editing. Higher cost — best for occasional deep work.

models.name: Claude Haiku 4.5
models.notes: Lowest cost. Good for quick checks and high-volume use.

providers.name: OpenAI — GPT
providers.description: GPT-4o is a capable all-rounder. Familiar to most developers and well-supported. Slightly less specialised for creative writing than Claude.
providers.apiKeyInstructions: Sign in → API Keys → Create new secret key

models.name: GPT-4o
models.notes: OpenAI's flagship model. Strong at following complex instructions.

models.name: GPT-4o mini
models.notes: Very cheap. Good for quick checks but may struggle with nuanced revision.

models.name: GPT-4 Turbo
models.notes: Previous generation flagship. Solid but GPT-4o is generally better value.

models.name: o3-mini
models.notes: Optimised for step-by-step reasoning. Less suited for direct creative writing.

providers.name: Google — Gemini
providers.description: Gemini models support very large context windows — useful for long manuscripts. Google's fastest-improving model family.
providers.apiKeyInstructions: Sign in with Google → Create API key

models.name: Gemini 2.5 Flash
models.freeTier: Free tier: 15 requests/min, 1,500 requests/day — enough for casual use
models.notes: Excellent value. Huge context window handles full-length novels. Free tier available for individual use.

models.name: Gemini 2.5 Pro
models.notes: Google's most capable model. Strong reasoning and very long context.

models.name: Gemini 2.0 Flash
models.notes: Cheapest paid option with a large context window. Also has a free tier.
